title: Fix PS66980:
body:
1. Replaced the unconditional overwrite with a CASE guard that preserves the existing DB value when @PreferredLanguageId = 0 (s_enc_read_user_for_login)
2. Moved update user profile before updating from ignition DB.
3. Added missing rollback in UpdateIgnitionDBUserFields
author: anahihull-dev

reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body: The ticket/reference ID in this update header comment doesn’t match the PR/file naming (PS-66980). Keeping the wrong ID will make it harder to trace why this script exists.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `s_enc_read_user_for_login` performs UPDATEs, but it doesn’t enable `SET XACT_ABORT ON` at the start. Per ProjectSight SQL write-proc conventions, write procedures should start with `SET XACT_ABORT ON` + `SET NOCOUNT ON` to ensure errors abort/rollback work consistently when the proc is executed inside a transaction.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: The refresh after `UpdateUserFromProfileServiceIfNeededAsync` only copies language/timezone fields back onto `ignitionUser`, but the profile service can also update identity fields like EMail/FirstName/LastName/CompanyName/TrimbleID. Since `user.UpdateFromIgnitionDBUser(...)` uses those properties, the runtime user can still be initialised with stale values until the next refresh.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This write stored procedure still doesn’t enable `SET XACT_ABORT ON` near the start (it only has `SET NOCOUNT ON`). Since this PR is already touching the proc, please add `SET XACT_ABORT ON` to the proc header in `base_procs_ignition.sql` as well (not just the ignition update script) so fresh installs get the same behavior.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This is incorrect. This will update the user from the profile service on every single request that is made from the web ui. This means 10's of thousands of requests per second. We cannot wait for a call to profile service for every one of these. We need to find a different approach.
review_comments.author: kcostenbader

files.patch:
@@ -6895,7 +6895,7 @@ AS
       UPDATE ApplicationUsers
          SET Logins = Logins + 1 ,
              LastLogin = @WhenRequested ,
-             PreferredLanguageId = @PreferredLanguageId ,
+             PreferredLanguageId = CASE WHEN @PreferredLanguageId != 0 THEN @PreferredLanguageId ELSE PreferredLanguageId END ,
              LastModified = @WhenRequested ,
              LastModifiedBy = @EMail
        WHERE UserID = @UserID

@@ -0,0 +1,273 @@
+﻿USE IgnitionMaster
+GO
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
+GO
+  /* Add a utility proc for dropping default constraints */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_util_drop_default') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+/****** Object: Stored Procedure s_util_drop_default ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+  @table_name     sysname ,
+  @column_name    sysname ,
+  @no_message     bit = 0
+AS
+DECLARE
+  @default_name   sysname ,
+  @table_id       int
+
+  SELECT @default_name = s.name
+    FROM (syscolumns sc INNER JOIN sysobjects s ON sc.cdefault = s.id)
+         INNER JOIN sysobjects pt ON sc.id = pt.id
+   WHERE sc.name = @column_name
+     AND pt.name = @table_name
+
+  IF @default_name IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      IF @no_message = 0
+        PRINT 'Dropping constraint ' + @default_name + ' from table ' + @table_name
+
+      EXEC('ALTER TABLE dbo.' + @table_name + ' DROP CONSTRAINT ' + @default_name)
+    END
+GO
+
+  /* Add a utility proc for getting the current environment */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.fn_util_get_env') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env
+GO
+/****** Object: Function fn_util_get_env ******/
+CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env() RETURNS NVARCHAR(100)
+AS
+BEGIN
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+
+  SELECT @environment =
+    CASE Environment
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prod' THEN 'na'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodeu' THEN 'eu'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodau' THEN 'au'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-produk' THEN 'uk'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-ps-gvi-p-sql-0' THEN 'hp'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea1' THEN 'fea1'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea2' THEN 'fea2'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea3' THEN 'fea3'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea4' THEN 'fea4'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-UAT' THEN 'fea5'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea6' THEN 'fea6'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-qa' THEN 'qa'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-performance' THEN 'performance'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-staging' THEN 'staging'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'
+    ELSE CASE WHEN TIDCallbackURL like 'http://localhost%' THEN 'localhost' ELSE 'other' END
+    END
+    FROM Control
+
+  RETURN @environment
+END
+GO
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP TABLE #update
+GO
+CREATE TABLE #update
+(
+    update_data          BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+)
+GO
+DELETE FROM #update
+INSERT INTO #update VALUES(0)
+GO
+
+/******************************** BEGINNING OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+-- PS-67963: Fix race condition where PreferredLanguageId was silently reset to 0 on every SSO login.
+-- The login stored proc was unconditionally overwriting PreferredLanguageId with the value from the
+-- ignitionUser object, which is always 0 because GenerateIgnitionUserForLogin() only populates
+-- EMail/UserID/TrimbleID.  The fix: preserve the existing DB value when @PreferredLanguageId = 0.
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_enc_read_user_for_login') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_read_user_for_login
+GO
+/****** Object:  Stored Procedure s_enc_read_user_for_login ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_read_user_for_login
+  @UserID                       uniqueidentifier ,
+  @TrimbleID                    uniqueidentifier ,
+  --@ClientID                   nvarchar(100) , -- not supported as of yet
+  @EMail                        nvarchar(255) ,
+  @SessionID                    nvarchar(60) ,
+  @PreferredLanguageId          int = 0 ,
+  @IsForLoginValidation         bit = 0 ,
+  @CurrentOrganizationID        UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = NULL ,
+  @ClientType                   int ,
+  @WhenRequested                datetimeoffset ,
+  @ValidationErrorCode          int = 0 OUTPUT
+AS
+  /* This method is used to retrieve the user at logon */
+
+  DECLARE
+   @OldTID         uniqueidentifier;
+
+  SET NOCOUNT ON
+
+  -- Primary case -- there should be zero or one matching rows
+  -- Primary case -- User identified by Trimble ID
+
+  IF @UserID IS NULL AND @TrimbleID IS NOT NULL
+    SELECT @UserID = UserID,
+           @OldTID = TrimbleID
+      FROM ApplicationUsers
+     WHERE TrimbleID = @TrimbleID
+
+  -- Secondary case -- User was already invited to PS (Trimble ID should be NULL)
+  -- Secondary case -- OnBehalfOf User specified by email address
+
+  IF @UserID IS NULL AND @EMail IS NOT NULL
+    SELECT @UserID = UserID,
+           @OldTID = TrimbleID
+      FROM ApplicationUsers
+     WHERE EMail = @EMail
+        -- OK To Use EMail when we can not use Trimble ID
+       AND (TrimbleID IS NULL OR @TrimbleID IS NULL)
+
+  -- No matching user -- the server will create a Application User in a bit
+
+  IF @UserID IS NULL
+    BEGIN
+        /* Invalid login */
+      SET @ValidationErrorCode = -1001
+      RETURN
+    END
+
+  IF  @SessionID IS NOT NULL
+  AND EXISTS(SELECT 1
+               FROM ExpiredSessions
+              WHERE SessionID = @SessionID)
+    BEGIN
+        /* Expired session */
+      SET @ValidationErrorCode = -9995
+      RETURN
+    END
+
+  IF @IsForLoginValidation = 1
+    BEGIN
+      SET NOCOUNT ON
+
+      IF @OldTID IS NULL and @TrimbleID IS NOT NULL
+        -- This must be a first login by an invited user,
+        -- Update UserID to match TrimbleID
+        UPDATE ApplicationUsers
+           SET UserID = @TrimbleID ,
+               TrimbleID = @TrimbleID ,
+               @UserID = @TrimbleID
+         WHERE UserID = @UserID
+            -- in case of race condition
+           AND TrimbleID IS NULL
+
+      IF @OldTID IS NULL and @TrimbleID IS NOT NULL
+        -- Since User ID updated, need to update Token Cache to match
+        UPDATE TokenCache_V4
+           SET UserID = @UserID
+         WHERE TrimbleID = @TrimbleID
+
+      /* Ensure we update the user activity */
+      UPDATE ApplicationUsers
+         SET Logins = Logins + 1 ,
+             LastLogin = @WhenRequested ,
+             PreferredLanguageId = CASE WHEN @PreferredLanguageId != 0 THEN @PreferredLanguageId ELSE PreferredLanguageId END ,
+             LastModified = @WhenRequested ,
+             LastModifiedBy = @EMail
+       WHERE UserID = @UserID
+    END
+  ELSE IF @CurrentOrganizationID IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      UPDATE UserOrganizations
+         SET LastActivityDate = @WhenRequested ,
+             LastActivityDateWeb = CASE WHEN @ClientType = 1 THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDateWeb END,
+             LastActivityDateAPI = CASE WHEN @ClientType = 7 THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDateAPI END,
+             LastActivityDatePhoneApp = CASE WHEN @ClientType = 8 THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDatePhoneApp END,
+             LastActivityDateOther = CASE WHEN @ClientType NOT IN (1, 5, 6, 7, 8) THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDateOther END,
+             HasVisited = 1
+       WHERE UserID = @UserID
+         AND OrganizationID = @CurrentOrganizationID
+    END
+
+  -- Karl - this doesn't do anything - and if it did, it should be combined with the next select statement
+  -- fetch email if we don't already have it
+  --IF @EMail IS NULL OR @EMail = ''
+  --  SELECT @EMail = Email
+  --    FROM ApplicationUsers
+  --   WHERE UserID = @UserID
+
+  SET NOCOUNT OFF
+
+  SELECT *,
+         CASE WHEN ProfileServiceLastChecked IS NULL THEN 1
+              WHEN ProfileServiceLastChecked < DATEADD(hh, -24, GETUTCDATE()) THEN 1
+              ELSE 0
+         END AS CheckProfile ,
+         CASE WHEN EMSServiceLastChecked IS NULL THEN 1
+              WHEN EMSServiceLastChecked < DATEADD(hh, -24, GETUTCDATE()) THEN 1
+              ELSE 0
+         END AS CheckEMS
+    FROM ApplicationUsers
+   WHERE UserID = @UserID
+
+  SELECT 1 AS HasFreeAccount
+    FROM Accounts
+   WHERE AccountType = 2
+     AND CreatedByUserID = @UserID
+     AND Inactive = 0
+
+  SELECT uo.* ,
+         o.Name ,
+         o.PictureName ,
+         o.Picture ,
+         o.PictureLastModified,
+         o.DBStatus,
+         a.LicenseKey,
+         a.AccountType,
+         a.ERPLinkType,
+         a.ERPUrl AS AccountERPUrl,
+         o.PortfolioERPUrl,
+         a.IsTrialAccount,
+         o.ExpiryDate,
+         o.ContactSearchLimitToProject ,
+         a.SalesforceId ,
+         a.TrimbleAccountId,
+         a.ProjectSightSKU,
+         a.AccountName ,
+         a.AccountID,
+         o.LicenseStatus,
+         fs.FileShare,
+         ds.DatabaseServerName,
+         a.SiteCapture
+    FROM UserOrganizations uo
+         INNER JOIN Organizations o ON uo.OrganizationID = o.OrganizationID
+         INNER JOIN FileShares fs ON o.FileShareId = fs.FileShareId
+         INNER JOIN DatabaseServers ds ON o.DatabaseServerId = ds.DatabaseServerId
+         INNER JOIN Accounts a ON o.AccountID = a.AccountID
+   WHERE UserId = @UserID
+     AND o.OrganizationID = @CurrentOrganizationID
+     AND o.Disabled = 0
+
+  EXEC s_enc_get_feature_flags @CurrentOrganizationID
+
+  EXEC s_enc_list_EMSLicenses @UserID
+GO
+
+/******************************** END OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  Start ***************************/
+
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER OFF
+GO
+
+-- DB VERSION NUMBER
+-- ## UPDATE versions set major = $major, minor = $minor, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+UPDATE versions set major = 10, minor = 183, revision = 0 where program_id = 'Core DB'
+GO
+DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+
+/*********************Do not make any changes below this section.  -  End  ****************************/
+

diff:
diff --git a/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/AuthenticationSystem.cs b/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/AuthenticationSystem.cs
index 4caf34e7b8..d929a47c8b 100644
--- a/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/AuthenticationSystem.cs	
+++ b/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/AuthenticationSystem.cs	
@@ -408,13 +408,29 @@ private async Task<bool> MergeIgnitionAndRuntimeUsersAsync(IDBHelper ignitionDB,
             // This must be done before merging the ignition user into the runtime user
             await system.UpdateUserFromEMSIfNeededAsync(ignitionDB, ignitionUser, forLogin, cancellationToken);
 
+            // Update from the profile service BEFORE merging into the runtime user.
+            var checkedProfile = ignitionUser.CheckProfile;
+            await system.UpdateUserFromProfileServiceIfNeededAsync(ignitionDB, ignitionUser, cancellationToken);
+
+            if (checkedProfile)
+            {
+                // Re-read profile-service-managed fields so the runtime user is not initialised
+                // with stale data (e.g. LanguageId = 0) that the service has since corrected in DB.
+                var refreshed = system.ReadUserByUserID(ignitionDB, ignitionUser.UserID, false);
+                if (refreshed != null)
+                {
+                    ignitionUser.PreferredLanguageId = refreshed.PreferredLanguageId;
+                    ignitionUser.LanguageCode = refreshed.LanguageCode;
+                    ignitionUser.UPSTimeZone = refreshed.UPSTimeZone;
+                    ignitionUser.WindowsTimeZone = refreshed.WindowsTimeZone;
+                    ignitionUser.ProfileServiceLastModified = refreshed.ProfileServiceLastModified;
+                }
+            }
+
             // Ensure that we have recorded the correct information from the ignition user
             var tcProjects = TrimbleConnectService.UnpackProjects(ignitionUser.TCProjectsCache, ignitionDB);
             user.UpdateFromIgnitionDBUser(ignitionUser, tcProjects);
 
-            // This must be done after merging the ignition user into the runtime user
-            await system.UpdateUserFromProfileServiceIfNeededAsync(ignitionDB, ignitionUser, cancellationToken);
-
             if (forLogin)
             {
                 // Finally, kick off a task to update the user from TC if this is a login request
diff --git a/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/UserSystem.cs b/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/UserSystem.cs
index f19e37103a..f22dd21f68 100644
--- a/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/UserSystem.cs	
+++ b/Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/UserSystem.cs	
@@ -974,6 +974,7 @@ private async Task<bool> UpdateIgnitionDBUserFieldsInternalAsync(IDBHelper ignit
                         // If nothing has changed in the user profile service since our last update, there is nothing else to do here.
                         if (user.ProfileServiceLastModified.Equals(Global.StrFromDB(profileServiceLastModifiedObject)))
                         {
+                            ignitionDB.RollbackTransactions(); // close the transaction opened above before returning
                             return false;
                         }
                     }
diff --git a/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql b/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql
index b78a403f03..92ad8ffef9 100644
--- a/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql
+++ b/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql
@@ -6895,7 +6895,7 @@ AS
       UPDATE ApplicationUsers
          SET Logins = Logins + 1 ,
              LastLogin = @WhenRequested ,
-             PreferredLanguageId = @PreferredLanguageId ,
+             PreferredLanguageId = CASE WHEN @PreferredLanguageId != 0 THEN @PreferredLanguageId ELSE PreferredLanguageId END ,
              LastModified = @WhenRequested ,
              LastModifiedBy = @EMail
        WHERE UserID = @UserID
diff --git a/Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_PS-66980.sql b/Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_PS-66980.sql
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000..bf92b04090
--- /dev/null
+++ b/Core/SQL/update_db_ignition_PS-66980.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,273 @@
+﻿USE IgnitionMaster
+GO
+SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
+GO
+  /* Add a utility proc for dropping default constraints */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_util_drop_default') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+GO
+/****** Object: Stored Procedure s_util_drop_default ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_util_drop_default
+  @table_name     sysname ,
+  @column_name    sysname ,
+  @no_message     bit = 0
+AS
+DECLARE
+  @default_name   sysname ,
+  @table_id       int
+
+  SELECT @default_name = s.name
+    FROM (syscolumns sc INNER JOIN sysobjects s ON sc.cdefault = s.id)
+         INNER JOIN sysobjects pt ON sc.id = pt.id
+   WHERE sc.name = @column_name
+     AND pt.name = @table_name
+
+  IF @default_name IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      IF @no_message = 0
+        PRINT 'Dropping constraint ' + @default_name + ' from table ' + @table_name
+
+      EXEC('ALTER TABLE dbo.' + @table_name + ' DROP CONSTRAINT ' + @default_name)
+    END
+GO
+
+  /* Add a utility proc for getting the current environment */
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.fn_util_get_env') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env
+GO
+/****** Object: Function fn_util_get_env ******/
+CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_util_get_env() RETURNS NVARCHAR(100)
+AS
+BEGIN
+DECLARE @environment nvarchar(100)
+
+  SELECT @environment =
+    CASE Environment
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prod' THEN 'na'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodeu' THEN 'eu'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-prodau' THEN 'au'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-produk' THEN 'uk'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-ps-gvi-p-sql-0' THEN 'hp'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea1' THEN 'fea1'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea2' THEN 'fea2'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea3' THEN 'fea3'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea4' THEN 'fea4'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-UAT' THEN 'fea5'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-fea6' THEN 'fea6'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-qa' THEN 'qa'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-performance' THEN 'performance'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-staging' THEN 'staging'
+    WHEN 'projectsight-labs' THEN 'labs'
+    ELSE CASE WHEN TIDCallbackURL like 'http://localhost%' THEN 'localhost' ELSE 'other' END
+    END
+    FROM Control
+
+  RETURN @environment
+END
+GO
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#update') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP TABLE #update
+GO
+CREATE TABLE #update
+(
+    update_data          BIT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+)
+GO
+DELETE FROM #update
+INSERT INTO #update VALUES(0)
+GO
+
+/******************************** BEGINNING OF UPDATES FOR THIS VERSION *************************************/
+
+-- PS-67963: Fix race condition where PreferredLanguageId was silently reset to 0 on every SSO login.
+-- The login stored proc was unconditionally overwriting PreferredLanguageId with the value from the
+-- ignitionUser object, which is always 0 because GenerateIgnitionUserForLogin() only populates
+-- EMail/UserID/TrimbleID.  The fix: preserve the existing DB value when @PreferredLanguageId = 0.
+
+IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.s_enc_read_user_for_login') IS NOT NULL
+  DROP PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_read_user_for_login
+GO
+/****** Object:  Stored Procedure s_enc_read_user_for_login ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_read_user_for_login
+  @UserID                       uniqueidentifier ,
+  @TrimbleID                    uniqueidentifier ,
+  --@ClientID                   nvarchar(100) , -- not supported as of yet
+  @EMail                        nvarchar(255) ,
+  @SessionID                    nvarchar(60) ,
+  @PreferredLanguageId          int = 0 ,
+  @IsForLoginValidation         bit = 0 ,
+  @CurrentOrganizationID        UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = NULL ,
+  @ClientType                   int ,
+  @WhenRequested                datetimeoffset ,
+  @ValidationErrorCode          int = 0 OUTPUT
+AS
+  /* This method is used to retrieve the user at logon */
+
+  DECLARE
+   @OldTID         uniqueidentifier;
+
+  SET NOCOUNT ON
+
+  -- Primary case -- there should be zero or one matching rows
+  -- Primary case -- User identified by Trimble ID
+
+  IF @UserID IS NULL AND @TrimbleID IS NOT NULL
+    SELECT @UserID = UserID,
+           @OldTID = TrimbleID
+      FROM ApplicationUsers
+     WHERE TrimbleID = @TrimbleID
+
+  -- Secondary case -- User was already invited to PS (Trimble ID should be NULL)
+  -- Secondary case -- OnBehalfOf User specified by email address
+
+  IF @UserID IS NULL AND @EMail IS NOT NULL
+    SELECT @UserID = UserID,
+           @OldTID = TrimbleID
+      FROM ApplicationUsers
+     WHERE EMail = @EMail
+        -- OK To Use EMail when we can not use Trimble ID
+       AND (TrimbleID IS NULL OR @TrimbleID IS NULL)
+
+  -- No matching user -- the server will create a Application User in a bit
+
+  IF @UserID IS NULL
+    BEGIN
+        /* Invalid login */
+      SET @ValidationErrorCode = -1001
+      RETURN
+    END
+
+  IF  @SessionID IS NOT NULL
+  AND EXISTS(SELECT 1
+               FROM ExpiredSessions
+              WHERE SessionID = @SessionID)
+    BEGIN
+        /* Expired session */
+      SET @ValidationErrorCode = -9995
+      RETURN
+    END
+
+  IF @IsForLoginValidation = 1
+    BEGIN
+      SET NOCOUNT ON
+
+      IF @OldTID IS NULL and @TrimbleID IS NOT NULL
+        -- This must be a first login by an invited user,
+        -- Update UserID to match TrimbleID
+        UPDATE ApplicationUsers
+           SET UserID = @TrimbleID ,
+               TrimbleID = @TrimbleID ,
+               @UserID = @TrimbleID
+         WHERE UserID = @UserID
+            -- in case of race condition
+           AND TrimbleID IS NULL
+
+      IF @OldTID IS NULL and @TrimbleID IS NOT NULL
+        -- Since User ID updated, need to update Token Cache to match
+        UPDATE TokenCache_V4
+           SET UserID = @UserID
+         WHERE TrimbleID = @TrimbleID
+
+      /* Ensure we update the user activity */
+      UPDATE ApplicationUsers
+         SET Logins = Logins + 1 ,
+             LastLogin = @WhenRequested ,
+             PreferredLanguageId = CASE WHEN @PreferredLanguageId != 0 THEN @PreferredLanguageId ELSE PreferredLanguageId END ,
+             LastModified = @WhenRequested ,
+             LastModifiedBy = @EMail
+       WHERE UserID = @UserID
+    END
+  ELSE IF @CurrentOrganizationID IS NOT NULL
+    BEGIN
+      UPDATE UserOrganizations
+         SET LastActivityDate = @WhenRequested ,
+             LastActivityDateWeb = CASE WHEN @ClientType = 1 THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDateWeb END,
+             LastActivityDateAPI = CASE WHEN @ClientType = 7 THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDateAPI END,
+             LastActivityDatePhoneApp = CASE WHEN @ClientType = 8 THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDatePhoneApp END,
+             LastActivityDateOther = CASE WHEN @ClientType NOT IN (1, 5, 6, 7, 8) THEN @WhenRequested ELSE LastActivityDateOther END,
+             HasVisited = 1
+       WHERE UserID = @UserID
+         AND OrganizationID = @CurrentOrganizationID
+    END
+
+  -- Karl - this doesn't do anything - and if it did, it should be combined with the next select statement
+  -- fetch email if we don't already have it
+  --IF @EMail IS NULL OR @EMail = ''
+  --  SELECT @EMail = Email
+  --    FROM ApplicationUsers
+  --   WHERE UserID = @UserID
+
+  SET NOCOUNT OFF
+
+  SELECT *,
+         CASE WHEN ProfileServiceLastChecked IS NULL THEN 1
+              WHEN ProfileServiceLastChecked < DATEADD(hh, -24, GETUTCDATE()) THEN 1
+              ELSE 0
+         END AS CheckProfile ,
+         CASE WHEN EMSServiceLastChecked IS NULL THEN 1
+              WHEN EMSServiceLastChecked < DATEADD(hh, -24, GETUTCDATE()) THEN 1
+              ELSE 0
+         END AS CheckEMS
+    FROM ApplicationUsers
+   WHERE UserID = @UserID
+
+  SELECT 1 AS HasFreeAccount
+    FROM Accounts
+   WHERE AccountType = 2
+     AND CreatedByUserID = @UserID
+     AND Inactive = 0
+
+  SELECT uo.* ,
+         o.Name ,
+         o.PictureName ,
+         o.Picture ,
+         o.PictureLastModified,
+         o.DBStatus,
+         a.LicenseKey,
+         a.AccountType,
+         a.ERPLinkType,
+         a.ERPUrl AS AccountERPUrl,
+         o.PortfolioERPUrl,
+         a.IsTrialAccount,
+         o.ExpiryDate,
+         o.ContactSearchLimitToProject ,
+         a.SalesforceId ,
+         a.TrimbleAccountId,
+         a.ProjectSightSKU,
+         a.AccountName ,
+         a.AccountID,
+         o.LicenseStatus,
+         fs.FileShare,
+         ds.DatabaseServerName,
+         a.SiteCapture
+    FROM UserOrganizations uo
+         INNER JOIN Organizations o ON uo.OrganizationID = o.OrganizationID
+         INNER JOIN FileShares fs ON o.FileShareId = fs.FileShareId
+         INNER JOIN DatabaseServers ds ON o.DatabaseServerId = ds.DatabaseServerId
+         INNER JOIN Accounts a ON o.AccountID = a.AccountID
+   WHERE UserId = @UserID
+     AND o.OrganizationID = @CurrentOrganizationID
+     AND o.Disabled = 0
+
+  EXEC s_enc_get_feature_flags @CurrentOrganizationID
+
+  EXEC s_enc_list_EMSLicenses @UserID
+GO
+
